nasb.text: Be diligent to present yourself approved to God as a workman who does not need to be ashamed, accurately handling the word of truth.

esv.text: Do your best to present yourself to God as one approved, a worker who has no need to be ashamed, rightly handling the word of truth.

cnv.text: 你應當竭力在　神面前作一個蒙稱許、無愧的工人，正確地講解真理的道。

ccb.text: 你应当竭力在上帝面前做经得起考验、问心无愧的工人，正确地阐释真理之道。

csbs.text: 你要努力地向神显明自己是经过考验的，是无愧的工人，能正确分解真理的话语。
